intent: Docstring-only update in src/oida_code/operator_soak/aggregate.py to align rule-5 wording with the QA/A35 sec.5.8-F tightening (rules 3 and 4 short-circuit before rule 5 fires, so reaching rule 5 implicitly requires false_positive_count < 2 AND false_negative_count < 2). No functional change. No test change. No schema change.
notes: Phase 5.8 (QA/A38): branch + controlled docstring change committed; real audit packet generated into bundle/. Workflow operator-soak.yml dispatched twice: (1) run 24994865500 failed at 27s due to relative-path bug in operator-soak.yml (../oida-target did not exist from $GITHUB_WORKSPACE cwd); (2) run 24995045522 succeeded at 1m56s after path fix in commit 0b7a657 (absolute github.workspace paths). Run 24995045522 outcome: gateway-status=diagnostic_only; gateway-official-field-leak-count=0 (ADR-22 hard wall holds); accepted_claims=0; rejected_claims=1 (C.docstring.no_behavior_delta rejected because pytest tool ran 193ms then errored, emitting no [E.tool.pytest.0] evidence; verifier honestly says 'requested tool ran but emitted no citable evidence; cannot promote pass-2 claims'). Independent forbidden-token scan over the 5 downloaded artefacts (action_outputs.txt, summary.md, grounded_report.json, audit/2026-04-27/pytest.jsonl, artifacts/manifest.json) returned zero hits across the FORBIDDEN_VERDICT_TOKENS list. Awaiting cgpro session phase58-soak label.json + ux_score.json. Claude has NOT written labels, NOT written UX scores.
